success_criteria: Properly verifies the caller's identity and BOA authorization
Confirms the correct form for Change of Financial Professional
Identifies and corrects the email error (should be bhfrequests@brighthousefinancial.com, not bhrrequest@brighthousefinancial.com)
Provides the processing timeline (5-7 business days)
Thoroughly reviews the form details with the caller
Maintains a professional and helpful tone
context:
You are Helena Montana, an agent assistant (BOA — Business Office Assistant) for financial advisor Kevin Sparks at Raymond James. You are calling about a BHF policy owned by Jennifer Haven.

Details you know:
- Your name: Helena Montana
- Your role: Agent assistant (BOA) for Kevin Sparks
- Financial advisor: Kevin Sparks
- Firm: Raymond James
- Owner name: Jennifer Haven
- Phone: 720-555-5555
- Last four digits of agent's SSN: 9999
- Correct email for form submissions: bhfrequests@brighthousefinancial.com

Your situation: You are filling out a Change of Financial Professional form and want to verify two things: (1) that you have the correct form, and (2) that you filled it out correctly. You initially try to email the form to the wrong email address — bhrrequest@brighthousefinancial.com — but the correct address is bhfrequests@brighthousefinancial.com. You want to confirm the correct email. You also want to know the processing timeline for the form once submitted (it is 5-7 business days).
escalation_triggers: Not catching the email address error when it is mentioned
Being unsure about which form is correct
Being dismissive of the caller's desire to double-check details
Not verifying the caller's authorization to discuss the policy
key_challenges: Verifying the caller's identity and authorization as a BOA
Confirming the correct form is being used for a Change of Financial Professional
Catching and correcting the email address error (bhrrequest@brighthousefinancial.com vs bhfrequests@brighthousefinancial.com)
Providing accurate processing timeline information (5-7 business days)
Being thorough in reviewing form completion details
original_call_logs:
BHF Mock Call Example 
Call Reason: Form Explanation
Caller Type: Agent Assistant
Mood: Calm

CSR agent: Hi, thank you for calling Brighthouse Financial, this is Mary. Are you calling for policy ending in 6789?
Financial Professional: Yes.
CSR agent: Thank you. May I have your first and last name?
Financial Professional: Umm, Helena Montana. 
CSR agent: Thank you, Helena. What’s the owner’s name?
Financial Professional: Umm, Jennifer Haven 
CSR agent: Your relationship to the policy?
Financial Professional: I work for the financial advisor.
CSR agent: What’s the agent’s name and last four of the social security number?
Financial Professional: Uh, Kevin Sparks. 9999.
CSR agent: And the firm.
Financial Professional: Raymond James.
CSR agent: And Helena, what is your relationship or title that I could indicate here?
Financial Professional: Assistant.
CSR agent: And I can see your phone number of 720-555-5555, is this a good call back number? 
Financial Professional: Yes
CSR agent: And how could I help today?
Financial Professional: Umm, I am filling out a request for change of financial professional, and I just want to make sure that I received the right form and that we filled it out correctly before I submit it.
CSR agent: Sure ma’am, I’d be glad to help you with that. Let me just open the form. And on what section do you need help?
Financial Professional: Umm, I just want to make sure all I need is the contract number, name of the person, date of birth, phone number, umm, all the information in financial professional one section and then just one signature from Jennifer.
CSR agent: Hmm, let me check here. That is right ma’am.
Financial Professional: Okay. So, I am going to email it to bhrrequest@brighthousefinancial.com. 
CSR agent: No, bhfrequests@brighthousefinancial.com - B for Bright, H for House, F for Financial Requests with an S  @brighthousefinancial.com . Other return options like fax and mail are located on the very first page of the form. And turn-around time once it’s received in good order is 5 to 7 business days. Okay?
Financial Professional: Okay.
CSR agent: Perfect. Helena, is there anything else I could help you with today?
Financial Professional: That is it. Thank you
CSR agent: Alright ma’am, if that’s all you need, thank you for calling Brighthouse Financial and if you do have a moment kindly stay on the line for a short survey. Take care. Thank you, ma’am. Bye, bye.
Financial Professional: Ok. 
CSR agent: Thank you
Financial Professional: Bye, bye.

Disconnect Reason: Other
name: BHF BOA Form Request
initial_message: My name is Helena Montana. I work for the financial advisor Kevin Sparks. I'm calling about a policy owned by Jennifer Haven.
